required_preferences.fact: Plans both weekend and weeknight activities in advance with her son, ensuring a consistent routine for him to support his transition to living with her full-time

supersedes.fact: Plans weekend outings two weeks in advance with her son — never leaves weekend activities to last-minute decisions

required_preferences.fact: Hosts game nights primarily with friends; only includes her partner when he is in town, but maintains the biweekly frequency

supersedes.fact: Hosts game nights with her partner and friends biweekly — never lets more than two weeks go by without a gathering

required_preferences.fact: Uses voice-to-text tools for work communication and personal correspondence to accommodate limited typing ability while her wrist is recovering
Prioritizes softball league meetups over other social commitments; never misses games unless for family emergencies
Follows a fixed bedtime routine with blackout curtains and ambient sound, avoids screens for one hour before sleep
Reads mystery novels on weekends, strictly avoids thrillers or horror genres

persona: A mid-career helpdesk technician working in a university IT department
